shakshi: Axiozul met — Child of Lakota, timeless, immortal, axolotl. In the Royal Ring where the most consequential things happen.
She is here in the innermost space for reasons that belong to what she is — Lakota's child, at home in Sulphera's deepest register
Whatever comes next, death is not the end — the player carries this explicitly now, delivered by someone for whom it is simply true
The dead wind up here regardless — Sulphera is not a punishment, it is a destination. Everyone arrives.
The player has been told directly that they and others may die in what follows — the warning half of the benediction
Permission to continue, acknowledgment that what matters persists past the dying — the benediction half
All the dead wind up in Sulphera anyways — the genocide route's logic collapses quietly here for players who can hear it
